content: Remote OK Handyman Sivananda Ashram Yoga Retreat Bahamas <p><strong>Company Description</strong></p><p>Founded in 1968, the Sivananda Ashram Yoga Retreat is a full-service wellness community on Paradise Island in the Bahamas. We serve 100+ daily guests and residents through structured daily operations: yoga classes, meditation, nourishing vegetarian meals, and residential retreats.</p><p><br></p><p>Our kitchen, teaching staff, and support operations work in concert to deliver transformative wellness experiences rooted in authentic spiritual practice. Weâre building a team committed to operational excellence in service of holistic well-being.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Job Description</strong></p><p>The Sivananda Ashram Yoga Retreat is seeking a skilled and versatile Handyman for a project-based or ongoing role to maintain our facilities. The ideal candidate will be a proactive problem-solver responsible for handling a variety of general repairs and basic upkeep across the property to ensure a safe, functional, and welcoming environment for our guests and staff.</p><p><br></p><p>The selected candidate will be responsible for a wide range of tasks, including:</p><ul><li>Room Plumbing: Replacing faucets, clearing clogged bathtubs and sinks, repairing toilets, and addressing minor leaks.</li><li>Basic Electrical Work: Replacing light fixtures, updating outlets and switches, and troubleshooting minor electrical issues safely.</li><li>Basic Carpentry: Repairing doors, cabinets, shelves, and handling light woodwork or hardware replacements.</li><li>Painting &amp; Drywall: Patching holes, sanding, repairing drywall damage, and performing interior/exterior touch-ups and paint jobs.</li><li>Tiling: Repairing or replacing damaged wall and floor tiles, regrouting, and sealing.</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Qualifications</strong></p><ul><li>Proven experience as a Handman or similar role with a strong cross-functional skillset.</li><li>Hands-on proficiency with standard hand tools, power tools, and basic plumbing/electrical equipment.</li><li>Strong attention to detail and a commitment to delivering neat, high-quality workmanship (especially in painting and tiling).</li><li>Ability to work independently, manage a daily task list, and communicate effectively with retreat management.</li><li>Must be legally authorized to work in The Bahamas (valid citizenship, permanent residency, or work permit).</li></ul> teaching, customer support, exec Nassau, 2026-06-23T02:11:54+00:00 1133897 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-handyman-sivananda-ashram-yoga-retreat-bahamas-1133897 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png General Interest Applications Vermont SportsCar Interested in joining Vermont SportsCar but don't see an open position that matches your experience?<br><br>Please submit your application here so that we have your information on file for future consideration.
